decision: Add scripts/deploy.sh (phased: preflight->capture->build/pull->db->migrate->up->health->done) + scripts/deploy-lib.sh (sourceable, unit-testable helpers). Target selection is CONFIG: deploy/env/<target>.env (kinsale/muckross/cloud). Replaces hard-coded package.json deploy:kinsale/deploy:muckross with a single `deploy` script. deploy-local.sh + rebuild.sh left UNCHANGED (still the daemon-consolidation/single-container helpers).
rationale: F9 spec + AC1-5. Env-file selection makes adding a target config-only. All external effects route through DOCKER_BIN/CURL_BIN/TCP_CHECK overrides so the phases are testable without a cluster.

decision: Stamp DAAX_DEPLOY_BY/VIA/MODE/HOST (NOT the spec's aspirational DAAX_DEPLOYED_BY/VIA) and pass them through the compose daax service.
rationale: lib/build/build-info.ts (the live F8 Build page) reads DAAX_DEPLOY_BY/VIA/MODE/HOST. Wiring the real consumed names is what actually surfaces provenance; the DAAX_DEPLOYED_* spelling in brain2daax.md is spec-only and unused in code.

decision: do_rollback is a no-op unless phase_capture ran (CAPTURED flag), not merely `[[ -f STATEFILE ]]` (mktemp pre-creates it).
rationale: Premortem: a preflight failure (e.g. missing secret) must leave the RUNNING production stack untouched. The -f check would have hit the 'fresh deploy' branch and run `compose down`, taking a live site offline on a misconfig. Locked in by a negative test asserting no `compose down` on preflight failure.

decision: Support managed Postgres via DATABASE_URL connection-string swap (DAAX_PG_MANAGED=1, preflight TCP reachability, fail-closed). Ship deploy/iac/cloud as a documented, provider-parameterized SKELETON (variables.tf contract + inert main.tf) — full IaC and a managed-only compose override are marked follow-ups per AC5 ('do NOT half-build broken Terraform').
rationale: Local needs no IaC; cloud is the same Compose stack on any VM (zero lock-in). The swap mechanism is real today; the resource graph is deliberately deferred.
